# Fumestory - Detailed Product Notes

Canonical Site: [https://fumestory.com/](https://fumestory.com/)

Fumestory is a web-based perfumery software product for perfume creators who need to organize materials, formulas, and development workflows in one place.

## Product Positioning
Fumestory is designed for independent perfumers and scent professionals who want structured workflows without unnecessary complexity.

## Core Workflow
1. Raw materials inventory
2. Dilution creation and tracking
3. Formula creation and management
4. Composition development for perfumes and accords with multiple formula versions

## Composition Model
A composition represents a perfume idea or an accord idea.  
Each composition can contain multiple formula versions, so users can iterate and compare modifications over time.

## Feature Areas
- Raw material inventory management
- Dilution tracking
- Perfume and accord formula management
- Compositions for organizing ideas with multiple formula versions
- Project and workflow settings

## Public URLs
- [Home](https://fumestory.com/)
- [Features](https://fumestory.com/features)

## Brand
- Name: Fumestory
- Website: [https://fumestory.com/](https://fumestory.com/)
